description: Letter from Jalal al-Dawla in the name of Yishay b. Shelomo to the Nasi Shelomo b. Yishay, Fustat. January 10, 1254 (Gil). Regarding a book that was found in Abu l-Fath’s estate after his passing. Yishay declares that the book belongs to his uncle, the Nasi Yoshiyahu b. Yishay, so it cannot be sold, but ha-Kohen Nafīs al-Dawla is interested in buying it for his son. They ask the addressee, who is in Damascus, for instructions about what to do. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #101) VMR
description_he: מכתב מהמאה ה-13 לפוסטאט. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
